Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x800F "PIPEMANIA-800F" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Pipe Mania.prg"
Metadata.Notes: NOP'd out the JSR $9BBC at $80D2 to skip a redundant disk access routine, allowing the game to start more quickly.
